_baseline_cfg:
show config interfaces ge400-0/0/34 | no-more

# NCP3-nog config-start [19-Apr-2026 22:06:12 UTC]

interfaces
  ge400-0/0/34
    admin-state enabled
  !
!

# NCP3-nog config-end

NCP3-nog#
step1_config_log:
configure
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34 urpf admin-state enabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34 urpf mode strict
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34 urpf allow-default disabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34 urpf address-family ipv4 admin-state enabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34 urpf address-family ipv4 mode strict
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34 urpf address-family ipv4 allow-default disabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34 urpf address-family ipv6 admin-state enabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34 urpf address-family ipv6 mode loose
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34 urpf address-family ipv6 allow-default disabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# commit
Commit succeeded by dnroot at 19-Apr-2026 22:06:52 UTC
NCP3-nog(cfg)# end
NCP3-nog#
step1_config_show:
show config interfaces ge400-0/0/34 urpf | no-more

# NCP3-nog config-start [19-Apr-2026 22:06:59 UTC]

interfaces
  ge400-0/0/34
    urpf
      admin-state enabled
      allow-default disabled
      mode strict
      address-family ipv4
        admin-state enabled
        allow-default disabled
        mode strict
      !
      address-family ipv6
        admin-state enabled
        allow-default disabled
        mode loose
      !
    !
  !
!

# NCP3-nog config-end

NCP3-nog#
